description.content: Remote Diagnostic Support service for view all resources.

This API creates a readout of available resources to the accessing party for one vehicle. If the result is available immediately, the result is returned. If the result isn't available, a location to the resource readout is returned. This location shall be polled until the result is available. INFO: GET Requests are not yet supported!

variable.description: (Required) vehicleId of the resources to be viewed

response.name: Returns a resource to the accessing party

variable.description: (Required) vehicleId of the resources to be viewed

response.name: The request has been accepted for processing, but not completed.

description.content: Remote Diagnostic Support services for view ecu List.

item.name: View the List of Ecu for Specific vehicleId

request.name: View the List of Ecu for Specific vehicleId

description.content: This API creates a readout of ECUs for one vehicle. If the result is available immediately, the result is returned. If the result isn't available, a location to the ECU readout is returned. This location shall be polled until the result is available. INFO: GET Requests are not yet supported!

query.description: Return this ECU id only. Default: Return all ECUs.

variable.description: (Required) The vehicle identifier of the vehicle to read from
(Required) The vehicle identifier of the vehicle to read from

description.content: Remote Diagnostic Support service for view dtc List.

item.name: View the List of Dtcs for Specific vehicleId

request.name: View the List of Dtcs for Specific vehicleId

description.content: This API creates a readout of DTCs for one vehicle. If the result is available immediately, the result is returned. If the result isn't available, a location to the DTC readout is returned. This location shall be polled until the result is available. INFO: GET Requests are not yet supported!

query.description: Return DTCs from this ECU id only. Default: Return DTCs from all ECUs.
Returns DTCs with this statuses only. Default: Return DTCs with all statuses.

variable.description: (Required) The vehicle identifier of the vehicle to read from.

description.content: Remote Diagnostic Support service for view dtc snapshot List.

item.name: View the List of Dtc Snapshot for Specific vehicleId

request.name: View the List of Dtc Snapshot for Specific vehicleId

description.content: This API creates a readout of a DTC snapshot from one vehicle. If the result is available immediately, the result is returned. If the result isn't available, a location to the DTC snapshot readout is returned. This location shall be polled until the result is available. INFO: GET Requests are not yet supported!

variable.description: (Required) The vehicle identifier of the vehicle to read from
(Required) The id of the ECU to read from
(Required) The id of the DTC associated with the snapshot
(Required) The vehicle identifier of the vehicle to read from
(Required) The id of the ECU to read from
(Required) The id of the DTC associated with the snapshot

(Required) The id of the DTC associated with the snapshot

description.content:
The Remote Diagnostic Support API will provide the possibility for 3rd party applications (e.g. ADAC, ATU, etc.) to access vehicle diagnostics data remotely on behalf of the Daimler customer. To use the endpoints you need a valid vin/fin (vehicleId).

Contact Support:
 Name: The open API platform by Mercedes-Benz
